inventory_effect: decrease - original part consumed from stock
clarification_question: Payment kasari liyeko ra original part ko cost basis kati thiyo?

user_input: hamro dokan ma laptop pani thodo thodo repair garne suru garya, first customer aayo, keyboard change garya 1500
normalized_meaning: Shop has started doing some laptop repairs too, first customer came, replaced keyboard for Rs 1500
inventory_effect: decrease - laptop keyboard consumed, new inventory category may need setup
clarification_question: Payment kasari liyeko ra part cost kati thiyo? Laptop repair lai alag category ma track garne ho?

user_input: aja ko din ma dherai customer aaye tara sabai sasto kaam matra, screen guard lagaune matra, jamma 500
normalized_meaning: Many customers came today but only for cheap work like applying screen guards, total Rs 500
inventory_effect: none if customers brought their own screen guards
clarification_question: Payment kasari liyeko, ra kati jana customer thiye?

user_input: aja dherai busy thiyo, tara exact record garna time bhayena, andaji 15000 jasto aayo
normalized_meaning: Today was very busy, didn't have time for exact records, roughly Rs 15000 came in
tax_effect: estimates risky for tax filing, exact records recommended
clarification_question: Kal exact amount yaad garna sakincha ki bill haru herna sakincha?

user_input: phone repair garda ek part chorieko rahecha, kaam sakiyera dekhda thaha vayo
normalized_meaning: Discovered a part was stolen during the repair process, noticed after the work was finished
tax_effect: may be deductible as business loss with proper documentation, but risk of scrutiny - recommend documenting incident
clarification_question: Kun part ho ra tesko cost kati thiyo?

user_input: aja ko customer le bill nai magena, cash ma matra tirya 500
normalized_meaning: Today's customer didn't ask for a bill, just paid Rs 500 in cash
tax_effect: even without a formal bill given to customer, income should still be recorded internally for accurate tax filing
clarification_question: Kun kaam garnu bhayo, part use bhayo ki labour matra?

user_input: dukan ko naya rangaune kaam garya, 5000 kharcha, cash ma tiryo
normalized_meaning: Got the shop repainted, spent Rs 5000, paid in cash
tax_effect: deductible business expense, unless considered capital improvement

user_input: aja ko din bank bata loan ko installment katiyo automatically, 2500
normalized_meaning: Today's loan installment of Rs 2500 was automatically deducted from the bank account
tax_effect: only interest portion is deductible expense, principal repayment is not
clarification_question: Installment ko kati principal ho ra kati interest, breakdown thaha cha?

user_input: aja customer le phone repair ko paisa dollar ma diyo, USD 20
normalized_meaning: Customer paid for phone repair in USD 20 instead of Nepali rupees
tax_effect: foreign currency income must be converted to NPR at applicable exchange rate for tax records, and foreign currency handling by unlicensed businesses may have regulatory restrictions under Nepal Rastra Bank rules - verify compliance
clarification_question: USD lena tapaiko dokan le authorized cha? NPR ma convert garna exchange rate kati liyeko?

user_input: aja ko din ma ek customer ko phone hamro dokan bata nai chor bhayo, uslai compensate garna paryo
normalized_meaning: A customer's phone was stolen from our shop premises, need to compensate them
inventory_effect: none unless replacement phone given from stock
tax_effect: deductible business loss with proper documentation and police report recommended
clarification_question: Kati amount compensate garne bhayo ra kasari payment garne?

user_input: aja pahilo pallo dukan sanga part share garya, unko part use garya customer ko repair ma, unlai paisa tirna paryo pachi
normalized_meaning: Borrowed a part from the neighboring shop today to use in a customer's repair, need to pay them back later
inventory_effect: increase - borrowed part effectively added then consumed in repair
tax_effect: informal arrangement, but should still be documented for accurate cost tracking
clarification_question: Kun part ho, kati amount ho, ra kun dukan bata liyeko?

user_input: aja ko din sabai transaction cash ma nai bhayo, kunai online payment aayena
normalized_meaning: All of today's transactions were in cash, no online payments were received
clarification_question: Total cash kati aayo aja?

user_input: aja dukan ma bijuli gayo, kaam garna sakina, generator chalayeko 100 diesel kharcha
normalized_meaning: Power went out today, couldn't work, ran a generator, spent Rs 100 on diesel

user_input: aja bijuli gayeko bela pani customer aayo, tara kaam garna sakina, phone chodyo bholi liyera aaune vanyo
normalized_meaning: A customer came during the power outage but the work couldn't be done, left the phone to be picked up tomorrow

user_input: custamr le screen chahiyo vanyo pero hamro sanga colour milena, order gareko
normalized_meaning: Customer wanted a screen but we didn't have the matching color, placed an order for it
clarification_question: Advance kunai liyeko cha ki order pura bhaye pachi matra payment?

user_input: special order ko screen aayo, customer lai call garya, usle 3000 tiryo aayera cash ma, part change garya sathai
normalized_meaning: The special-order screen arrived, called the customer, they came and paid Rs 3000 cash, part was replaced on the spot
clarification_question: Screen ko cost kati thiyo profit calculate garna?

user_input: helper le galti le battery kharab pariyo test garda, loss vayo, 800 ko battery
normalized_meaning: Helper accidentally damaged a battery while testing, resulting in a loss of an Rs 800 battery
inventory_effect: decrease - battery written off due to damage
tax_effect: deductible loss if properly documented, though internal mishandling losses may face scrutiny

user_input: aja ko din supplier ko sathi aayo, sasto rate ma part becha, sample ko lagi, 5 piece 1000 ma
normalized_meaning: A supplier's associate came today and sold parts at a cheaper rate as samples, 5 pieces for Rs 1000
inventory_effect: increase - 5 sample parts added to stock
tax_effect: check if any bill/receipt was provided for VAT input purposes
clarification_question: Payment kasari garnu bhayo, ra bill/receipt liyeko cha?

user_input: aja repair garya tara customer ko phone software le block bhayo, uslai vanya password lock magne, customer aauna manena, kunai paisa nai lina paayena
normalized_meaning: Repaired the phone today but it was software-locked, needed the customer's password, they refused to provide it, couldn't collect any payment
inventory_effect: unknown - depends if any part was used before the block was discovered
clarification_question: Kunai part use bhayo yo repair try garda?

user_input: customer le screen ko warranty card magyo, hamile diyou 6 mahina ko
normalized_meaning: Customer requested a warranty card for the screen, provided a 6-month warranty

user_input: aja ko din e commerce bata order aayo mobile accessory ko, daraz bata, 3 piece 900 ma
normalized_meaning: Received an e-commerce order today for mobile accessories via Daraz, 3 pieces for Rs 900
inventory_effect: decrease - 3 accessory items removed from stock
tax_effect: e-commerce sales may have platform commission deducted, and VAT applicability depends on registration status
clarification_question: Daraz ko commission kati katera settle huncha, tapaiko haat ma net kati aaune ho?

user_input: aja Facebook marketplace bata order aayo, customer le direct dukan ma aayera 1200 cash ma phone case liyo
normalized_meaning: An order came via Facebook marketplace today, customer came directly to the shop and bought a phone case for Rs 1200 cash

user_input: aja dukan ma naya rack banayeko, storage badhauna, 6000 kharcha bank ma
normalized_meaning: Built a new storage rack in the shop today for increasing storage, spent Rs 6000 via bank
inventory_effect: none - capital asset, not resale item

user_input: aja purano rack becha 1000 ma jun chaidaina aba
normalized_meaning: Sold an old rack that's no longer needed for Rs 1000
credit_accounts: Furniture & Fixtures (Fixed Asset, at book value)
inventory_effect: none - disposal of fixed asset, not inventory
tax_effect: gain or loss on disposal may have tax implications depending on book value vs sale price
clarification_question: Yo rack ko original value ra depreciation kati record ma cha, ra payment kasari liyeko?

user_input: aja ko din ma sabai payment cheque ma liyo customer haru le, thulo order thiyo
normalized_meaning: All payments today were received via cheque from customers, it was a big order
clarification_question: Kati amount ko cheque thiyo, ra kun kun kaam ko lagi?
